title: Intel security advisory (AV26-453)
description: On May 12, 2025, Intel published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products:
products: Display Virtualization for Windows OS driver software  versions prior to 2119
Intel EMA software  versions prior to 1.14.5
AI Playground software  versions prior to 3.0.0 alpha
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
